element_introduction_order.mastery_context: fundamental navigation on non-scrolling screen-based layouts with multiple altitude levels
combat against enemies and corrupt police; basic ranged offense
damage absorption mechanic; resource management of recharge opportunities
defensive tool to block enemy shots; unlimited use allows experimentation
discovering navigation paths through complex multi-level screen layouts toward objectives
vertical navigation essential for traversing altitude-varied screens
reaching previously unreachable areas; solving late-game spatial puzzles; progression gate

typical_tension_triggers: multi-level spatial puzzle without clear solution
narrow ledge navigation with enemies present
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: screen-by-screen pacing with escalating spatial complexity; tension releases through successful navigation and puzzle solutions; intensity builds as late-game teleportation mechanic introduces new challenge types

difficulty_curve.early_game: basic platforming fundamentals with pistol and shield introduction; manageable enemy encounters; teaches altitude-based navigation on non-scrolling screens
difficulty_curve.mid_game: spatial puzzle complexity increases; multi-screen challenge layouts requiring route discovery; enemy patterns become more aggressive
difficulty_curve.late_game: teleportation device unlocks complex spatial solutions; Morph hideout infiltration demands precision navigation and combat; final sequences require mastery of all mechanics
notable_spikes: Death Tower gladiatorial deathmatch (major mid-game challenge)
Morph hideout infiltration and escape sequence (late-game spike)
teleportation device puzzle sections (late-game complexity spike)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level spans many discrete non-scrolling screens; player must complete navigation/puzzle per screen before advancing; creates distinct challenge cadence
Nearly all screens feature multiple levels of altitude requiring jumping, climbing, ledge-grabbing, and vertical traversal; emphasizes three-dimensional platforming on 2D view
Early levels emphasize reflexive platforming; progression introduces increasing spatial complexity requiring player to discover navigation routes without explicit direction
New mechanics (pistol, force field, teleportation device) introduced through plot progression; late-game teleportation device gates access to final areas
